final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: still life editorial photo, square crop
Primary request: wabi-sabi style still life photograph of a rough ceramic vase with bare dry branches on a weathered wooden table, natural light raking in from a window at an angle
Scene/backdrop: aged wooden table surface with worn, uneven patina; soft interior background, minimal and quiet
Subject: coarse hand-thrown ceramic vase, uneven glaze with visible cracks and imperfections, holding sparse dry bare branches with no leaves
Style/medium: 35mm film photography, still life editorial, wabi-sabi aesthetic
Composition/framing: medium close-up, slightly low angle, shallow depth of field, negative space preserved around subject
Lighting/mood: soft raking natural window light from the side, casting long gentle shadows, warm and melancholic, emphasizing texture and the passage of time
Color palette: muted earth tones — warm grey, dusty beige, aged wood brown, pale bone white
Materials/textures: rough unglazed ceramic with visible finger marks and kiln scars, weathered wood grain with scratches and stains, dry brittle branch bark
Constraints: preserve the sense of imperfection, impermanence, and quiet solitude; no artificial light sources
Avoid: overly polished or symmetrical composition, bright saturated colors, clean modern surfaces, plastic-looking ceramic
